name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: app, enhancement

---

# ✨ Feature Idea
*A concise, single sentence summary of the feature idea.*


## The Problem
*Briefly explain the user need or problem this feature addresses. Why is it needed?*


## The Solution
*Describe the feature in simple terms. How should it work? What are the main things it needs to do?*


## Non-Goals
*What is explicitly NOT included in this feature's scope for now? This helps manage expectations.*
- [ ] 
- [ ] 


## Acceptance Criteria (Key Points)
*How will we know it's done and working correctly? List 1-2 main checks.*
- [ ] 
- [ ] 


## Technical Notes (Optional)
*Any brief thoughts on implementation or potential challenges?*


## Additional Context (Optional)
*Anything else? Links, screenshots, examples?*
